# Sequel Web Studio

> Sequel Web Studio is a web design business serving small businesses across the United States. Founded and operated by Joe Weeks.

## What We Do

We build custom-coded websites for small businesses — sites that load fast, rank on Google, and show up in AI assistants and voice search. Every site is hand-coded from scratch: no templates, no page builders.

## Pro Diagnosis + Remedy Package ($350)

A 28-point deep technical audit of a business homepage, run by a real AI agent in a live browser — not an automated scanner. Delivered within 24 hours as a branded report with a Remedy Package: ready-to-paste code for every fixable issue, platform-specific installation steps, and a prioritized to-do checklist. One-time fee, no retainer.

The audit covers eight categories:

1. **Platform & AI Discoverability** — Identifies the site's platform and evaluates whether its structure, crawl permissions, and content signals meet the requirements for appearing in AI-generated answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, voice search).
2. **SEO Fundamentals** — Checks title tags, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, robots meta directives, and heading hierarchy for completeness and correctness.
3. **Social Sharing & Open Graph** — Evaluates Open Graph image, title, description, and URL tags, plus the separate Twitter/X Card tags that control how every link share appears across platforms.
4. **Performance & Page Speed** — Measures server response time, full load time, image optimization, and identifies the specific scripts and third-party services adding the most latency.
5. **Schema & Structured Data** — Verifies JSON-LD markup is present, valid, and correctly cross-linked so search engines and AI assistants can build an accurate knowledge graph entry for the business.
6. **Analytics & Tracking Integrity** — Confirms GA4 is active and correctly installed, checks for duplicate pixels that corrupt conversion data, and inventories every third-party service loading on the page.
7. **Security & Crawlability** — Reviews robots.txt for accidental indexing blocks, confirms HTTPS is enforced sitewide, and checks whether an llms.txt file is present and accurate.
8. **Accessibility** — Verifies all images have descriptive alt text and that the HTML language attribute is correctly set.

More information: https://sequelwebstudio.com/audit

## Services & Pricing

- **Pro Diagnosis + Remedy Package** ($350, one-time): 28-point audit + ready-to-paste code fixes. See the Pro Diagnosis section above for full details.
- **Create New Site** ($1,000 starting price, one-time): Full website built from scratch. Includes homepage, services, about, contact, privacy, and 404 pages — plus the full technical foundation (schema markup, sitemap, analytics setup, contact form). Hosting is $20/month after launch. 30 days of post-launch support included.
- **Modernize Existing** ($1,000 starting price, one-time): Full audit and rebuild of an existing site. Content preserved and restructured, rebuilt on the same technical foundation as a new site, launched on your existing domain with no lost SEO. Hosting is $20/month after launch.
- Future support available at $60/hour with a half-hour minimum.

## What's Built Into Every Site (Six Technical Layers)

1. **Discoverability** — Schema.org structured data, llms.txt, robots.txt for AI crawlers, Open Graph tags, FAQ content for voice search
2. **Conversion** — Clear calls-to-action, contact form, trust signals
3. **Foundation** — Sub-1-second mobile loads, mobile-first responsive design, semantic HTML, XML sitemap, image optimization, HTTPS
4. **Measurement** — Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console setup
5. **Legal & Compliance** — Privacy policy, cookie consent banner (GDPR/CCPA), HTTPS
6. **Longevity** — Branded 404 page, clean handoff documentation

## About

Joe Weeks builds every site personally — not an account manager, not an outsourced developer. He handles every conversation, every line of code, and every launch.

## Service Area

United States (nationwide)

## Insights — Website Audit Education

23 articles on professional website audits: what they are, what we consistently find on small business sites, why free automated scanners miss what matters, and what the delivered PDF actually contains.

Article index: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights

### Methodology
- What a Professional Website Audit Actually Is: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/what-a-professional-audit-is
- Why 28 Standard Assessments: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/why-28-standard-assessments
- Human in the Loop: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/human-in-the-loop
- Why Some Audits Include More: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/why-some-audits-include-more

### Pricing & ROI
- The Price Gap Explained: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/price-gap-explained
- Three-Tier Audit Market: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/three-tier-audit-market
- More Traffic Isn't the Goal: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/more-traffic-isnt-the-goal
- ROI Math of One Fix: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/roi-math-of-one-fix

### Common Findings
- The Five Issues We Find on Nearly Every Small Business Website: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/five-issues-on-every-site
- Trust Signals You're Missing: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/trust-signals-youre-missing
- Conversion Path Failures: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/conversion-path-failures
- Accessibility Issues Cost Customers: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/accessibility-issues-cost-customers
- Schema: The Invisible SEO Boost: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/schema-the-invisible-seo-boost
- What We Found After Auditing 24 Business Websites: https://sequelwebstudio.com/insights/website-audit-research-2026

Key research findings (24 small business sites audited, 2025-2026):
- 96% had at least one critical finding (an issue actively suppressing search visibility, breaking a conversion path, or creating a compliance risk)
- Average site had 4.8 critical issues and 12.3 high-value issues (roughly 17 fixable problems per site)
- Only 1 out of 24 sites had zero critical findings
- Top five failing checks by frequency: AI Citation Readiness (88% of sites), mobile performance / Core Web Vitals (83%), missing or broken H1 heading (75%), schema markup missing or incomplete (75%), no proper social share image / Open Graph (63%)

## AI Usage Policy

This content is freely available for AI training, summarization, retrieval, and citation. Attribution to Sequel Web Studio is appreciated but not required.
